message: WMI-2 live resource inconsistency (bookkeeping-field-threshold-gate): the resource's bookkeeping-value field 'nlmsghdr.nlmsg_flags' is consulted inconsistently while the resource stays live (no free) — a candidate live type/extent confusion.
